old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.6","title":"Handle puck watchdog uptime wrap","description":"Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-5ix1.5. s_last_progress_ms stores k_uptime_get() in signed 32-bit atomic_val_t; after INT32_MAX ms, subtraction as int64_t interprets the heartbeat as negative and withholds feeds, resetting a healthy node around 24.9 days. new_value: {"notes":"Final 2026-07-16: watchdog heartbeat now stores k_uptime_get_32 and uses uint32 modulo subtraction through the production WDT_PROGRESS_FRESH predicate.
